creator: bc979@lafn.org
text:
Created attachment 217119
Patch to add missing information to dma man page

The dma man page (/usr/src/contrib/dma/dma.8) does not contain critical information that is needed in order to get dma to connect to a remote MTA.  It took me several days of reading the dma source to figure out how to make it work.  I am attaching a patch to the man page to provide this information.
